firmwares.name: Alien Rhythm
firmwares.description: 3-voice Klee shift-register sequencer with resonant filter

knobs.5: Sync / hocket mode (CCW=sync with gate 2, noon=always fire, CW=hocket)

cv_out.1: Top voice pitch (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60 / middle C)
cv_out.2: Bottom voice pitch (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60 / middle C)

io.leds: 16-step sequencer position across 8 LEDs (2 steps per LED; bright=active, dim=inactive)

firmwares.name: Potato Bass
firmwares.description: Turing machine bass synthesizer with additive harmonics, sub-bass, and portamento

knobs.5: Turing loop probability (CCW=always change, CW=frozen loop)

gate_out.1: Fires on accent step (gate in 2 high)
gate_out.2: Fires on non-accent step (gate in 2 low)

cv_out.1: Alt note pitch from Turing hi-byte (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60)
cv_out.2: Main note pitch with octave shift (1V/oct, 0V = MIDI 60)

io.leds: Turing register lower 8 bits as bitmap (1 LED per bit)
io.audio_out: Stereo filtered bass synthesis + audio in

firmwares.name: Wizard Drumkit
firmwares.description: Euclidean + Perlin noise drum sequencer with 3 switchable voices and logistic chaos/swing

knobs.7: HiHat Perlin Y offset (shifts pattern in noise space)
knobs.8: Snare Perlin Y offset (shifts pattern in noise space)

switches.1: Kick model (up=808, center=909, down=basic tone drum)
switches.2: Snare model (up=808, center=909, down=basic noise drum)

cv_in.3: Kick pitch V/oct (wraps within 1 octave, base = C2 / 65 Hz)

gate_in.1: External clock (overrides internal BPM when present)
gate_in.2: Open hihat trigger (forces long decay on next hit)

io.leds: 16-step sequencer position across 8 LEDs (2 steps per LED)
io.audio_in: Summed with drum synthesis output (stereo passthrough)
io.audio_out: Stereo kick + snare + panned hihat mix
